title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Lodha & Co - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Lodha & Co - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha & Co are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha & Co:
Lodha & Co is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha & Co!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
